steps.title: Identify the fixed cost component
steps.content: Company X charges a flat \$950 for the first 3 hours. This amount is fixed regardless of the total rental time $t$. We write this as the constant term: \$950$.

steps.title: Identify the variable cost component
steps.content: After the first 3 hours, each additional hour costs $50. Since the total rental time is $t$ hours and the first 3 hours are already accounted for, the number of additional hours is $(t - 3)$. The cost for these additional hours is $50(t - 3)$.

steps.title: Write the total cost equation
steps.content:
The total cost equals the fixed cost plus the variable cost, and we're told this total is $1,150:

$$950 + 50(t - 3) = 1,150$$

That matches choice C — C is correct.
